title: Optimizing Resource Allocation
scenario: Create a prompt that will output a step-by-step plan for a manager to optimize resource allocation across multiple teams, taking into account team size, workload, and skill sets. The plan should be detailed enough to assign specific resources to each task, ensure workload balance, and avoid resource duplication.
constraints: Must be under 5 minutes of reading time
Must include a clear visual representation of the plan

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated plan adhere to the given constraints and requirements?
Does the plan effectively optimize resource allocation, avoiding duplication and ensuring workload balance?
Is the plan clearly explained and easy to read?
